plugins.name: eyelevel-design
plugins.description: EyeLevel brand + web UI skills. Bundles the medium-agnostic EyeLevel design standards (palette, typography, logos, brand principles, cross-medium patterns) with a React/MUI web UI skill that translates those standards into drop-in TypeScript components. Use this plugin when building dashboards or web surfaces for EyeLevel products (e.g., GroundX).

plugins.name: eyelevel-presentations
plugins.description: EyeLevel brand + slide deck skills. Bundles the medium-agnostic EyeLevel design standards with an HTML→PDF slide skill that renders 16:9 decks styled to match EyeLevel's web UI. The slide build pipeline uses headless Chrome (Puppeteer) to produce a single deck.pdf from a folder of HTML files — same palette, typography, and surface language across mediums.

plugins.name: eyelevel-all
plugins.description: The complete EyeLevel brand skill bundle: design standards + web UI + slide decks. Install this plugin to give Claude every EyeLevel-flavored medium at once — React components, slide decks, and the shared source of truth that keeps them visually consistent. EyeLevel is a Valantor company; GroundX is one of EyeLevel's products and consumes these standards.
